title: SS Progression Week 4 – TEST
purpose: Week 4: extended work at higher intensity (test)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 11:12 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 92% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/3. 92-92% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 92% for 23:12. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 23:12.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/3. Power: 92-92%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 2 of 3. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/3. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/3. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 2. 1 to go. 34 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 92% for 23:12. Then 11min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 92% × 23:12. Then 11min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 23:12 at 92%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 92% for 23:12. Then 11min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 92% × 23:12. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 86% complete. Rep 1/1. 50% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 86% into session. 50%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
